docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2014 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-26-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $700.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING NOVEMBER 15, 2014 & CONTINUING ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT PLUS INTEREST IS PAID. PAYABLE IN CASH AT JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S OFFICE. IF NO APPEARNCES, CONTINUE CASE FOR 6 MONTHS", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-20-2015 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-11-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAKUBOVA, INNA AS TO DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YAKUBOVA, INNA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED NOV-12-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2015; JUDGMENT DEBTOR LUVSANRAVDAN LECTSEG FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT $500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE. AS TO DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YAKUBOVA, INNA AS TO DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN HEARING SET FOR OCT-23-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN HEARING SET FOR APR-20-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SIGNED & SEALED (ORIGINAL) BENCH WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER WITH ONE (1)COPY FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $125.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAKUBOVA, INNA AS TO DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAKUBOVA, INNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-29-2015 SERVICE FEES $100 AS TO DEFENDANT LECTSEG, LUVSANRAVDAN
